sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49640" key="qwu+kth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θωϋκτήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n49640.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">barker, roarer,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">APl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.91</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
